Efficient Post Silicon Debug Platforms for Future Many Core Systems

Developing a Post Silicon Debug framework to optimize the bug localisation process during the Post Silicon Validation.

Other contributors

View all contributors
8T 1R/1RW sram cell array design with mux16

Feb 2022 – Apr 2022


Associated with Indraprastha Institute of Information Technology, Delhi

Designed 8T 1R/1RW SRAM cell for mux 16 configuration using 65nm technology as per the following specifications:
 Vmin (read port): 0.81v
 Vmin (write port): 1.08v when mux 16
 Vmin (write port): 0.81 when mux 1 with WL Boost assist scheme
 Icell: 100uA at worst corner, 1.08v
Arrived at the proper sizing of the transistors to able to satisfy the requirement of minimum
area and to do the 6-Sigma qualification of figure of merits like Read SNM, Hold SNM, Write 
Margin at their respective critical PVT’s. Also implemented the write assist scheme, Wordline 
Boost, to qualify ‘Write Margin’ at low voltage of operation.
Made the DRC/LVS clean layout followed by pex analysis.

Other contributors

View all contributors
Design of AOI221 complex gate using Static logic

Aug 2021 – Nov 2021


Associated with Indraprastha Institute of Information Technology, Delhi

Show project
Design the Complex gate Schematic design and individual CMOS implementation of each design 
using virtuoso on 65nm Technology. Calculated the sizing of the transistor using the concept of 
logical effort and also maximizing width given the 12T cell height. Designed two layouts one with a simple gate and the other with a complex gate design.
Done DRC Cleaning, LVS, and Post layout extraction. Also, done Pre and Post layout simulation 
using ELDO.Calculated various parameters like Static power, dynamic power, and also verifies design at different PVT.

Other contributors



View all contributors
HW-SW co-design Implementation of of Viterbi decoder algorithm on Zedboard using Xilink SDSoC

Feb 2021 – Apr 2021


Associated with Indraprastha Institute of Information Technology, Delhi

Hardware Software partitioning of viterbi decoding algorithm using Xilink SDSoc. The hardware co-design was implemented using the Zed board. The core objective was to implement the algorithm on the software alone and then implement it using the hardware-software co-design approach and analyse the achieved performance gain. A performance gain of around 10X was realised with the HW-SW co-design approach.

Other contributors



View all contributors
RTL to GDS flow

Feb 2021 – Apr 2021


Associated with Indraprastha Institute of Information Technology, Delhi

Implemented complete VLSI Design Flow (RTL to GDS) using various tools of Cadence, and 
Synopsys.
Written RTL code for a given problem, compiled, elaborated, simulated, generated, and 
analyzed code coverage report, synthesize the design, generated Power & Area report, 
performed STA, logical equivalence checking, and inserted scan-chain in the design for DFT.
Physical design: Floorplanning using the utilization of 0.5 and 0.8, placement, clock tree 
synthesis, global & detailed routing, Power Analysis, and finally writing out final GDS

Other contributors
